name: chromium

web browser

browsing experience.
.
This package contains the web browser component.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use chromium because @@PACKAGE - the web browser from Google.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use chromium as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair chromium with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `chromium --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
